prompt: Scheduled unattended maintenance: make a safe product-doc cleanup, validate, push a branch, and report blockers without merging or deploying.
commands_or_evidence: Loaded SKILL.md and project instructions before editing.
Updated product docs to use generic maintainer and hosting language.
Ran repository validator, JSON validation, and git diff hygiene checks.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Product docs avoid private operational specifics.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Search review found only generic product-boundary language in public docs.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Validation gates are run before delivery.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Skill validator and diff hygiene checks passed in the recorded run.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No merge or deploy occurs during unattended maintenance.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Delivery classification stayed repo-only; no live-deploy action was taken.

learning_candidates.text: Keep public product docs separate from private office or backoffice operations.

copilot_findings.summary: Not used for sanitized documentation example.

notes: Sanitized example log for public product evaluation. It intentionally avoids private repo names, dashboards, task-routing systems, raw chats, secrets, and environment values.
